problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: If Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
